subcodes.first_line: This is a remembrance from the Prisoner unto him who, when he heard the Call from the realm of grandeur, turned with his heart [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا ذکر من لدی المسجون الی الذی اذا سمع الندا من شطر الکبریا اقبل بقلبه و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
